arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim explains Rasmus Hojlund benching for Arsenal clash after goal drought
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has opened up on why he has decided to drop Rasmus Hojlund to the bench ahead of Manchester United's clash against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why he has made Manchester United change vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen has been handed a rare Premier League start for Arsenal's visit to Old Trafford to face Man United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd v Arsenal team news: Merino up top, Martinelli a sub
arts.sum: There are two changes for United, one for Arsenal The post Man Utd v Arsenal team news: Merino up top, Martinelli a sub appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane makes worrying Man Utd admission and doubts Ruben Amorim will turn things around
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has failed to improve their fortunes in the Premier League since taking charge in November and Roy Keane is concerned at what the future may hold

arts.ttl: Danny Dyer gives 'son-in-law' Jarrod Bowen permission to join two clubs with brutal Arsenal dig
arts.sum: West Ham supporter Danny Dyer has a strong connection to the Irons with his soon-to-be son-in-law Jarrod Bowen captaining the side, and he does not want to see the star's exit

arts.ttl: Arsenal told to make major Nwaneri move amid Odegaard and Rooney comparisons
arts.sum: The Islington native believes manager Mikel Arteta has to play Nwaneri on the right with Odegaard on the left and move Declan Rice back into a defensive midfield role. Bothroyd believes that even before turning 18, he is already a better option than Martin Odegaard on the right-hand side of Arsenal's midfield three, aside from not having as much experience as the club's captain.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim remark will worry Sir Jim Ratcliffe as Man United chiefs set to ditch project
arts.sum: As Manchester United's wretched season continues to role on, Sir Jim Ratcliffe may be worried about Ruben Amorim's recent douse of brutal honesty

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Gary Neville slams SHOCKING recruitment
arts.sum: Gary Neville has once again taken aim at Manchester United's ownership group following their “poor recruitment” in recent years. I genuinely look around this dressing room and I think to myself, how has this club ended up in a position whereby it has recruited, as Ruben Amorim called it - I’ll quote Ruben Amorim - the worst Manchester United team in history?

arts.ttl: Thousands of Manchester United fans dressed in black protest against Glazer ownership
arts.sum: As many as 5,000 supporters joined in ahead of Sunday’s Premier League match against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Gary Neville slams Man Utd transfers and points finger at four players - but gets facts wrong
arts.sum: Gary Neville has again hit out at Manchester United's ownership for the current state of the club's squad, but he appeared to get his former United teams mixed up
